name: factible
description: Infraestructura open source para integrarte con el Estado uruguayo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @factible/validar && npm run build -w @factible/bcu && npm run build -w @factible/cfe && npm run build -w @factible/id-uruguay && npm run build -w @factible/montevideo
scripts.release: npm run build && npm test && changeset publish
